svg.title: Prompt Engineering End-to-End Flow
svg.desc: A dynamic flowchart showing how a prompt travels from the user through the five principles of prompting into an AI model and back as a refined output, with a feedback loop for evaluation.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What makes a good user prompt for an AI model?')
sendPrompt('How do I give clear direction in a prompt?')
sendPrompt('How do I specify output format in a prompt?')
sendPrompt('What is few-shot prompting and how do examples improve results?')
sendPrompt('How do I evaluate the quality of AI prompt outputs?')
sendPrompt('How does dividing tasks across multiple prompts help AI?')
sendPrompt('What does a well-engineered refined prompt look like?')
sendPrompt('What is tokenization in large language models?')
sendPrompt('What is a system prompt and when should I use one?')
sendPrompt('How does a large language model like GPT-4 process a prompt?')
sendPrompt('What does a raw AI output look like before evaluation?')
sendPrompt('How do I evaluate and score AI outputs systematically?')
sendPrompt('What does a good final AI output look like after prompt engineering?')
sendPrompt('How do I take a prompt from testing to production?')
